name: NOTA Rising
description:
Elected amid deep political division, you become President of the United States with a bold economic agenda: a 43.6% top marginal tax rate paired with a sovereign wealth fund designed to actively drive national investment. While critics label it radical, the results are undeniable. National debt falls sharply, infrastructure revives, and the middle class begins to recover.

The sovereign wealth fund rapidly evolves from traditional energy investments into cutting-edge sectors like AI, biotech, fusion energy, and terraforming technologies. Companies such as Nautlix Inc. lead breakthroughs in artificial intelligence and nuclear fusion, while Volta Group dominates next generation battery innovation. Together, they accelerate what is now called the Fifth Industrial Revolution.

As economic conditions improve, political opposition does not disappear. It transforms. The old MAGA movement fades, replaced by a new populist force: NOTA (No Taxation Without Representation). Framing taxation as exploitation and reinterpreting founding American ideals, they rapidly gain momentum.

Inside the White House, your inner circle becomes divided. Your wife sees both the historical parallels and the growing risks of extremism. Your chief of staff argues that policy success alone is not enough. Control of public narrative is now essential. Freedom of speech remains intact, but so does the urgency to respond.

Outside the gates, NOTA protests grow louder, echoing slogans of taxes, liberty, and representation.

Your presidency has reshaped the economy but now faces a different challenge: not survival of policy, but control of the nation’s story itself.

You can find the complete the Oval Decisions Series via the link below 🔗📚

creator: ScreamingWolf
